description: Calculate the Signal-to-Background Ratio (SBR) for a quality assurance check using a CT scan from ~/DICOM/samples/ct_scan/ (or ~/DICOM/samples/synthetic/ if the first is empty). Determine the mean HU values for a 'Bone' ROI within a high-density bone structure and an 'Air' ROI in the background. Record the Bone Mean, Air Mean, and the calculated Ratio (Bone Mean / Air Mean) in a text file at ~/DICOM/exports/bone_air_ratio.txt. Save a screenshot of the interface showing both ROIs to ~/DICOM/exports/qa_rois.png.
